Figure 7: System prompts used in FinLongDocAgent.

Figure 1: An example QA instance from FinLongDocQA. The figure shows only the relevant tables and text for presentation; in practice, the model must retrieve them from the full annual report before computing the answer.
Figure 6: Full prompt template used for QA generation.
Table 1: Comparison of financial QA datasets. Doc RAG denotes settings where QA is grounded in a full document and retrieval is required to find evidence.
Figure 2: Illustration of the construction steps for our FinLongDocQA dataset.

Table 7: Exact Match (EM) performance on FinLongDocQA across different difficulty levels, categorized by the number of table evidence sources: Easy (≤1 table), Medium (2 tables), and Hard (≥3 tables).
Table 9: Error analysis of FinLongDocAgent. Q: question, G: golden answer, P: model prediction.
